channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - techraptor.net
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for techraptor.net

item.title: Everything is Crab 1.1 Update Released
item.content:encoded:
If you've ever enjoyed the idea or play of the early part of Spore or just enjoy run-based roguelites, Everything is Crab is a fine specimen that has fun with the idea of carcinization and now the first Everything is Crab update is here.

Having picked from various evolution and level screens, there are new things of many types for players to customize their Darwin with, or change the way Everything is Crab plays.

A pair of new evolutions come in with Tracker, and Lick Wounds. Tracker has 3 levels and tracks alpha monsters and you get it in your evolution pool by having sense or exploration based evolutions like Nomadic or Snout. The other is Lick Wounds, an 'ultimate' ability that is added to the pool if you have Saliva or Whining, and has 5 levels. It provides a rare self-heal ability.

Some skills got new specializations, meaning that they add special abilities once you reach a certain level in an evolution and allow you to choose between two abilities. Three evolutions got them added: Stoner, Leech, and Spur, all of which are different abilities and giving them even more capability to stand out. Additionally, players can turn down specializations if neither fits, and get 10 mutagen points in return that can be used for re-rolling evolutions or increasing their rarity.

Everything is Crab meta-progression got a significant tweak as previously a number of evolutions were locked behind beating certain levels of challenge runs. Now these are unlocked by beating the main Pressure numbers, such as instead of needing to beat all Pressure 3 Challenges to get Hibernation, you now just need to beat Pressure 2. This applies to 9 evolutions, and a 10th evolution (Pollinator) had its unlock number reduced.

To encourage and reward challenge runs, Everything is Crab has added new cosmetics there which you can unlock to customize how your Darwin looks.

A lot of small quality of life changes have also been worked on, which look to make the game even smoother to play. Some of them doing stuff like giving you an extra HP each level or clearer UI on displaying certain abilities. You can read all the notes here. This update also added a Twitch extension for players to play with audiences.

What's Next on the Everything is Crab roadmap?

This marks the 'mid-summer' update and then we have the 'Late-Summer' update which will add a community designed addition, free cosmetics, and more bug fixes. Following that this Fall there will be a Paid DLC content update, along with a free content update as well as a special collaboration. Most excitingly this update will have extended water biome gameplay, as that biome feels the least developed right now. After that, 2027 will have more content and support, but the team has yet to provide details on it.

A longtime lover of speculative fiction, in almost all its forms, Don joined TechRaptor in 2014 on a whim sending in an application as he was looking for… More about Don



https://techraptor.net/gaming/news/everything-is-crab-11-update-released
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Dungeon Masters Season 2 Will Feature Material from Dungeons & Dragons Arcana Unleashed
item.content:encoded:
Wizards of the Coast has announced new details for Dungeon Masters Season 2. The newest season of their official Dungeons & Dragons actual play will feature returning talents, heroic action, and showcase new player options in the upcoming Arcana Unleashed supplement.

The Dungeon Masters Season 2 Announcement

According to report by Variety, Dungeon Masters Season 2 will debut July 8 on YouTube. Jasmine Bhullar will return as host and Dungeon Master for the show alongside actors Devora Wilde (Baldur's Gate 3, Clair Obscur: Expedition 33), Neil Newbon (Baldur's Gate 3, Resident Evil: Village), Mayanna Berrin (Dispatch), and Christian Navarro (Forgotten Realms: Tears of Selune).

The set-up for Season 2 is the players are members of the Order of the Ninth Quill, hurled into the Anarouch Desert. This desert is a wasteland, surging with dangerous magic dating back to the fall of the Netherese Empire. Worse still, the arcane barrier keeping the dangerous energy from the rest of Faerun is beginning to fail. Making matters worse is there are other groups in the desert wishing to obtain this dangerous power for themselves.

Much like Season, Dungeon Masters Season 2 will showcase material from an upcoming Dungeons & Dragons book. Season 1 took players through the Domains of Dread as featured in Ravenloft: The Horrors Within. Season 2 will have players using four new character subclasses from the upcoming Arcana Unleashed.

Newbon will be playing Sailor, an Aasimar Warrior of the Mystic Arts Monk. Wilde will portray "Princess" Hobnip, a Goliath Arcane Archer Fighter. Navarro will bring to life Cadmus Pennypetal, a Human Transmuter Wizard. Lastly, Berrin will be Sapphira Horayas, a High Elf Vestige Warlock. Several of these subclasses were originally featured as Unearthed Arcana back in September.

The report also confirms more seasons of Dungeon Masters will be coming later this year. According to Wizards of the Coast, Seasons 3 and 4 will be arriving, with their respective themes to be revealed at a later date.

Ever since he was small, Tyler Chancey has had a deep, abiding love for video games and a tendency to think and overanalyze everything he enjoyed. This… More about Tyler



https://techraptor.net/tabletop/news/dungeon-masters-season-2-will-feature-material-from-dungeons-dragons-arcana-unleashed
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
